parentQuestion: A pharmaceutical company develops a highly effective anti-cancer drug, but it fa...

scaffolds.q: The chemical level of organization includes atoms and molecules.
scaffolds.explain: The chemical level is the FOUNDATION — atoms combine into molecules, molecules interact based on their properties. Everything above this level DEPENDS on chemistry. Absorb this:into this: change ONE atom in a molecule, and you can transform a life-saving drug into a poison. The stakes are that precise.

scaffolds.q: Molecular properties like solubility determine how substances cross membranes.
scaffolds.explain: Lipid-soluble molecules cross membranes easily. Water-soluble molecules? They need transport proteins or channels. The CHEMISTRY of the molecule dictates its MOVEMENT. this is why drug design is an art of molecular architecture.
